description_long: This is a modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a minimalist exterior clad in light gray siding. The front facade features a main entry door with a small paved area, flanked by several evenly spaced rectangular windows. The house includes a fenced-in front yard with a green lawn, a swing set, and outdoor dining furniture, suggesting a family-friendly environment. The rear and side facades are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality. The interior layout is partially visible from above, showing multiple rooms and a staircase connecting the two floors. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric lines and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray siding, and a fenced front yard featuring a swing set and outdoor furniture. The design is minimalist with rectangular windows and a simple entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, paved walkway, fenced green yard with a swing set, outdoor dining area, and several windows.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the length of the house, a single window, and the continuation of the fenced yard with playground equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a plain facade, highlighting the house's rectangular shape and flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the yard, swing set, and the house's simple, windowless side wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with paved approach, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
